svg.title: Sale processing flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart of how a sale is processed: from cart submission through stock validation, tax calculation, payment confirmation, receipt generation, and stock deduction.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the cashier add items to the cart?')
sendPrompt('How is stock validated before a sale?')
sendPrompt('What error is returned for insufficient stock?')
sendPrompt('How are line totals and tax calculated?')
sendPrompt('What does the sale transaction include in the database?')
g.text: Single DB transaction, rollback on fail

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is stock decremented after a sale?')
sendPrompt('What information is on the generated receipt?')
